summary: [ART-CHARTER] Governing signed charter: approved formal goal is enzyme activity prediction. Protein structure generation is an explicit non-goal. Molecule generation, docking, and structure prediction were early brainstorming only and were not approved. [ART-DATA] Human-approved data decision: use EnzymeBench v3, snapshot EBV3-7A91, with a family-disjoint train/validation split. EnzymeBench v2 and the temporary CSV export are deprecated; they remain only in old notes for reproducibility and must not be used for formal runs.
